title: jhon1995-04/gigacheck
summary: GigaCheck 是一款用于检测和分类大型语言模型的工具，通过优化工具和数据集，简化了对 AI 输出的理解和分析过程，支持 CUDA 加速矩阵乘法运算，适用于大型语言模型的性能评估和监控。
description: 🔍 Detect and classify large language models with GigaCheck, enabling better understanding and analysis of AI outputs through streamlined tools and datasets.
